hero.headline: Your smartest guide to
hero.subtext: Get instant answers about admissions, programs, deadlines, campus life, and everything else UTP has to offer — available anytime, no waiting.
hero.disclaimer: No account needed · Free to use · Always available

messages.text: Hello! I'm the UTP assistant. How can I help you today?
What are the admission requirements for Computer Science?
For Computer Science at UTP you'll need a high school diploma with a minimum GPA of 3.0, math and science scores, and to complete the entrance exam. Would you like details on the application process?
Yes, when is the next deadline?

features.title: Everything you need, instantly
features.subtitle: The UTP ChatBot is designed to be your first stop for any university-related question.

items.title: University Knowledge
items.desc: Get instant answers about programs, courses, faculty, deadlines, and campus life — all sourced directly from UTP's official information.

items.title: Available 24/7
items.desc: No need to wait for office hours. Ask anything at any time and get accurate, helpful answers in seconds.

items.title: AI-Powered
items.desc: Powered by cutting-edge AI, the chatbot understands natural language so you can ask questions just like you would to a person.

items.title: Reliable & Accurate
items.desc: Built on verified university data to ensure the information you receive is trustworthy and up to date.

howItWorks.title: Three steps to your answer
howItWorks.subtitle: No setup. No sign-up. Just ask.

steps.title: Open the Chat
steps.desc: Click 'Start Chatting' to open the assistant — no account needed.

steps.title: Ask Your Question
steps.desc: Type anything: admissions, schedules, programs, fees, or campus services.

steps.title: Get an Instant Answer
steps.desc: Receive a clear, accurate response in seconds backed by UTP's knowledge base.

cta.title: Have a question about UTP?
cta.subtitle: The assistant is ready right now. Ask about programs, fees, deadlines, or anything else.
